pkgmetadata.longdescription: A collection of IETF IANA MIBs compiled into PySNMP classes.Note that there is also PySMI package (httpspypi.python.orgpypipysmi) that converts ASN.1 MIBs into PySNMP form.Latest PySNMP (4.3+) invokes PySMI automatically to handle ASN.1 MIBs.See httppysnmp.sf.net httppysmi.sf.net
